summary: Fixed JsonStore fallback cloning and hardened HTTP/SSE boundary handling with timeout, response validation, and SSE frame parsing tests.
exported_interfaces: JsonStore.read() now returns a JSON-serializable deep clone of the default value for missing or invalid files.
httpRequest(method, url, body, extraHeaders, requestOptions) supports requestOptions.timeoutMs.
sseConnect(url, extraHeaders, options) rejects non-2xx and non-text/event-stream responses before calling onOpen, and parses SSE events by blank-line frames.
notes: TDD red step: node --test test/json-store.test.js test/http-helper.test.js timed out before implementation because httpRequest lacked timeout handling.
Final verification: node --test test/json-store.test.js test/http-helper.test.js passed with 13 tests, 0 failures.
Only task-owned files and this handoff were modified.
